GRN & Receiving

Purchase ID Supplier Date Items Status Actions
Click "Load Pending Purchases" to fetch data

Raw Material Batches

Batch ID GRN Reference Material Quantity Unit Expiry Date Location Created
Click "Load Batches" to fetch data

Production & Finished Lots

Lot ID Product Quantity Unit Production Date Expiry Date Location Batch Sources Created
Click "Load Production Lots" to fetch data

Stock by Location & Expiry

Type ID Item Name Quantity Unit Location Expiry Date Days Until Expiry Status
Click "Refresh Stock" to fetch data

Transfers (TRS / TRR)

Transfer ID Type From Location To Location Items Status Created Actions
Click "Load Transfers" to fetch data

Sales Consumption

Sale ID Lot ID Product Quantity Unit Customer/Outlet Sale Date External Reference
Click "Load Sales Records" to fetch data

Adjustments (Waste / Test)

Adjustment ID Type Batch/Lot ID Item Quantity Unit Reason Date External Reference
Click "Load Adjustments" to fetch data

Traceability & Recall

Traceability Chain

Transaction Type Reference ID Item Quantity Date Location External Reference
Enter a Lot ID or Batch ID and click "Trace" to view traceability chain
